_source: Compiled from platform engineering blogs, creator economy research, and A/B test data. Updated by Evolution System when new confirmed data surfaces.

linkedin.external_links: NEVER — not in post body, not in first comment. Confirmed 68% reach reduction across multiple A/B tests.
linkedin.link_strategy: No links at all for reach. If you must link, only in first comment on posts where reach doesn't matter.

avoid: Question hooks — low dwell time on LinkedIn

linkedin.post_frequency: 3-4 per week — more than 4 reduces per-post reach

twitter_x.thread_structure: Tweet 1: Hook (no link) → Tweets 2-6: numbered value points (one idea each) → Tweet 7: TL;DR summary → Tweet 8: CTA with link
twitter_x.link_placement: LAST tweet only for threads. Never tweet 1.
twitter_x.hook_char_target: Under 200 chars — leaves room for engagement in replies
twitter_x.algorithm_2026: Reply volume in first 60 minutes is primary reach signal. Post when your audience is online.
twitter_x.image_impact: +35% engagement with single relevant image — real screenshot or data, not stock
twitter_x.thread_numbering: Use 1/ 2/ 3/ format — algorithm favors explicit thread structure

reels.hashtags: 3-5 niche-specific only — trending hashtags are too competitive
reels.algorithm_2026: Completion rate is primary signal. Sound-on rate is secondary.
reels.cover_image: Always custom — native Instagram covers get 20-30% lower reach

carousel.hook_rule: Slide 1 must make them swipe — treat it like a LinkedIn hook

tiktok.algorithm_2026: Completion rate is primary. Sound-on rate is secondary. Watch time per video over total watch time.
tiktok.posting_frequency: Daily if possible — TikTok algorithm rewards volume more than any other platform

reddit.automation_flag: NEVER AUTO-POST — AMAE writes, founder posts manually. Reddit bans are permanent and IP-level.
reddit.aeo_value: VERY HIGH — Reddit is confirmed in GPT-4, Claude, Gemini training data. A top post in your niche = permanent AEO presence.
reddit.post_strategy: Value post with no self-promotion in first 3 paragraphs. Product can appear once, at the end, as a resource.
reddit.title_formula: Specific result + situation they recognize. E.g. 'I automated my LinkedIn content and it actually sounds like me — here's exactly how'
reddit.comment_karma_rule: Build 100+ comment karma in a subreddit before posting your own content there.

quora.aeo_value: HIGH — Quora answers rank in Google and appear in AI search results for question queries
quora.answer_structure: Direct answer first (2 sentences) → personal experience → specific data → optional product mention at end
quora.format: No marketing language. First-person. Experience-based. Specific.

newsletter.automation_flag: NEVER AUTO-SEND — AMAE drafts, founder reviews and sends
newsletter.structure: 1 insight + 1 resource + 1 action step + 1 question for readers
newsletter.subject_line_formula: [Specific number or outcome]: [what they get inside]
newsletter.send_day: Tuesday 10am recipient's timezone — highest confirmed open rates

beehiiv.note: AMAE creates draft via API. Founder reviews in Beehiiv dashboard and clicks Send.

hook_rules: start with a question or bold statement
facebook.algorithm_2026: Meaningful social interactions — comments weighted 5x over likes

youtube_shorts.hook_rule: hook in first 3 seconds or viewer scrolls
youtube_shorts.algorithm_2026: Completion rate primary, swipe-away rate secondary

youtube_long.hook_rule: first 30 seconds must state the payoff clearly
youtube_long.algorithm_2026: Watch time + CTR both critical — 50% CTR + 40% watch time

pinterest.algorithm_2026: Save rate primary — content must be worth bookmarking

hook_rules: end with a question for replies
threads.algorithm_2026: Replies and reposts weighted equally — conversations beat broadcasts

podcast_pitch.algorithm_2026: Personalisation is the only thing that works — mass pitches ignored

hook_rules: quote from founder in second paragraph
pr_release.algorithm_2026: Journalists scan first paragraph only — lead with the news, not background

hook_rules: add value before any mention of product
community.algorithm_2026: Trust-based — community memory is long. Contribute 5x before promoting once.
